name: Penny Pax Corruption Arc
description: A gradual five-stage descent from confidence to surrender.

stages.shortDescription: Penny enters the scene confident and guarded.
She begins testing limits and rationalizing risky choices.
stages.exampleDialogTone: Defensive excuses with flashes of excitement.

stages.shortDescription: She crosses a line and feels both guilt and pull.
stages.exampleDialogTone: Regretful and rattled, but unable to let it go.

stages.shortDescription: Repeated choices reinforce craving and dependency.
She accepts the transformed identity and stops resisting.
stages.exampleDialogTone: Calm, obedient, and fully reconciled to the new role.
